title: Charity Metadata Schema
description: Schema for core identifying metadata about a charity, such as names, web domains, and tax identifiers.

chinese_name.description: The official Chinese name of the charity.

alias.description: Commonly used acronyms or alternative names for the charity (e.g., 'SPCA', 'WWF-HK').

domains.description: A list of official website domains associated with the charity.

s88_id.description: The charity's Section 88 tax exemption identifier from the Hong Kong IRD (e.g., '91/1234', '91/12345').
